info.title: WCP Markets API
info.description: Contract-first API for the WCP Markets platform.

post.summary: Get a signed upload URL for a listing image

200.description: Signed upload URL (PUT the image bytes to it)

post.summary: Open an offer on a listing

get.summary: A deal with its event log

post.summary: Pay an accepted offer (opens the escrow hold)
Seller marks the item handed off
Buyer confirms receipt (releases funds to the seller)

get.summary: Chat messages for a deal (party only)

post.summary: Buyer opens a dispute on a paid/handed-off deal

get.summary: Read a dispute case (party or staff)

post.summary: Seller responds to a dispute (routes it to support)
Support admin resolves a dispute (release or refund)
